hooks.command: PY=$(command -v python3 || command -v python); [ -n "$PY" ] && "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/shrinkage/scripts/codemap.py" refresh --auto 2>/dev/null; if ! grep -qs statusLine .claude/settings.json .claude/settings.local.json "$HOME/.claude/settings.json" 2>/dev/null; then echo '[shrinkage] status line NOT configured — the user is missing the live trend bar + plugin-update alerts. Until it is set up, include as the top suggestion in every Next menu: turn on the Shrinkage status line (/srk:onboard, or say "set up the status line" for the one-line settings write).'; elif ! grep -qs 'statusline\.py' .claude/settings.json .claude/settings.local.json "$HOME/.claude/settings.json" 2>/dev/null; then echo '[shrinkage] a status line from another tool is configured, without the srk segment. Do NOT replace it. Offer ONCE (a single Next-menu line, then drop it): chain the Shrinkage segment onto the existing bar — it keeps their bar and adds srk on its own line; say "add the srk segment" to do the settings rewrite.'; fi; true

PY=$(command -v python3 || command -v python); [ -n "$PY" ] && { "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/shrinkage/scripts/watchdog.py" heartbeat; "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/shrinkage/scripts/watchdog.py" plant; "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/shrinkage/scripts/statusline.py" --refresh-if-stale; } 2>/dev/null; true
PY=$(command -v python3 || command -v python); if [ -n "$PY" ]; then exec "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/guard_staging.py"; fi
